calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff, Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Segal Industries, LLC.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Leonard A. Segal, Jr., and the Second Cause Action, was filed on April 16, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant on March 12, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 12, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Segal Industries, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $186,291.77.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,196.64.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $455.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $196,443.77.

It is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in Exhibit A attached to the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
